steps.title: Identify the stated goal
steps.content: The passage explicitly tells us the student wants to “specify when al-Biruni published his landmass theory.” The strongest clue is the word when — the answer must include the specific date from the notes (1037 CE).

steps.title: Apply the goal to the choices
steps.content: Choice A opens with “In 1037 CE,” and directly answers the “when” question by supplying the publication date. The others all omit the date the goal requires. That matches choice A — A is correct.
